summary: The diff implements REQ-1 comprehensively. Dark mode CSS custom properties are defined in frontend/src/index.css with high-contrast OKLCH tokens for all semantic color roles (foreground, card-foreground, muted-foreground, sidebar-foreground, popover-foreground, etc.). All major components and pages (Header, KPICard, Sidebar, StatusBadge, chart components, and all page components) use these semantic tokens via Tailwind utility classes. Chart axes use CSS custom property references (var(--muted-foreground), var(--border)). No hardcoded color values are introduced for text contrast. No files under the protected paths were modified. All acceptance criteria appear addressed.
